common.siteDescription: Discover the best travel packs, find flights and gear up for your next adventure with our recommendations.
common.affiliateDisclosure: As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases. This site also participates in affiliate programs from GetYourGuide and Civitatis. By clicking affiliate links and making a purchase, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you.

home.title: {siteName} - Travel Packs, Flights & Gear
home.heroDescription: Curated travel packs with the best accommodations and local experiences. Your adventure starts here.
home.featuredDescription: Curated routes with the best accommodations and local experiences so you can just enjoy the ride.
home.flightCtaDescription: Compare prices and find the best flight deals to your next destination.
home.productsDescription: The essential products we recommend to make your trip comfortable and safe.

packs.title: Travel Packs
packs.metaDescription: Discover our curated travel packs with routes, accommodations and local experiences. From tropical adventures to cultural routes.
packs.description: Complete routes with selected accommodations and the best local experiences. Choose your adventure and start planning.
packs.noResults: No packs found with the selected filters.

packDetail.accommodationsDescription: Three options for every budget. All verified and with excellent ratings.
packDetail.experiencesDescription: The best activities selected to complement your trip.

flights.title: Search Flights
flights.metaDescription: Find the best flights for your next trip. Compare prices, choose your class and book at the best price.
flights.heading: Find your ideal flight
flights.description: Enter your travel details and we'll help you find the best flight options.
flights.tip1Description: Flying midweek (Tuesday and Wednesday) is usually cheaper. Try different date combinations.
flights.tip2Description: The best prices are usually found 6 to 8 weeks before the flight for European destinations.
flights.tip3Description: Sometimes flying to a nearby airport can save you hundreds of euros.

shop.title: Travel Shop
shop.metaDescription: Essential products for your trip: luggage, electronics, accessories and more. Real recommendations with links to Amazon.
shop.description: Our recommended products to make your trip a comfortable, safe and memorable experience.
shop.priceDisclaimer: Prices and availability are approximate and subject to change. The final price is shown on Amazon at the time of purchase.
shop.primeBannerTitle: Try Amazon Prime free for 30 days

footer.description: Your travel platform with the best packs, flights and gear for your next adventure.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Tengo Un Viaje: your travel platform with curated packs, flights and gear. Transparency about our affiliate links.
about.title: About Tengo Un Viaje
about.subtitle: We believe planning a trip should be as exciting as the trip itself.
about.missionText: Tengo Un Viaje was born from a simple idea: to gather everything you need to plan your next adventure in one place. From travel packs with day-by-day routes, verified accommodations and local experiences, to a flight search engine and the essential products for your luggage.
about.howItWorksText: We research, test and select the best options for each destination. Each pack includes a complete route with accommodations for different budgets and the experiences that are truly worth living. We are not an agency: we give you the information and you decide how, when and with whom to travel.
about.affiliateText: This website contains affiliate links to services such as Amazon, Booking, GetYourGuide and Civitatis, among others. If you book or purchase through our links, we receive a small commission at no additional cost to you. This is what allows us to keep the website running and continue creating quality content. We only recommend products and services that we consider useful and trustworthy.
about.contactText: If you have any questions, suggestions or collaboration proposals, you can write to us at hola@tengounviaje.com. We'd love to hear from you.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Looks like this page went on a trip. Go back to the homepage to keep exploring.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies to make the site work and optional analytics cookies to improve your experience.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of Tengo Un Viaje. Learn how we handle your data, what cookies we use and what your rights are under the GDPR.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: At Tengo Un Viaje we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, for what purpose and what your rights are. By browsing this website, you accept the practices described in this policy.
privacy.controllerText: The data controller is Tengo Un Viaje, with contact email at hola@tengounviaje.com.
privacy.dataText: This website does not have registration forms, login or newsletter subscriptions. We do not collect personal data directly. The only data collected is:
privacy.dataCookies: Anonymous browsing data through analytics cookies (Google Analytics), including anonymized IP address, pages visited, time spent and device type.
privacy.dataAffiliate: Interaction data with affiliate links managed by third parties (Amazon, Booking, GetYourGuide, Civitatis), subject to their own privacy policies.
privacy.purposeText: The browsing data collected through analytics cookies is used exclusively to:
privacy.purpose1: Analyze website usage and improve its content and performance.
privacy.purpose2: Obtain anonymous traffic and user behavior statistics.
privacy.legalBasisText: Data processing is based on your consent, which you grant by accepting non-essential cookies through the cookie banner. You can withdraw your consent at any time.
privacy.cookiesText: This website uses the following types of cookies:
privacy.cookiesEssential: Essential cookies: necessary for the basic functioning of the site (language preference, cookie consent). They do not require consent.
privacy.cookiesAnalytics: Analytics cookies (Google Analytics): allow anonymous web traffic analysis. They are only activated if you accept optional cookies.
privacy.cookiesMoreInfo: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time from the cookie banner or from the cookies page.
privacy.affiliateText: This website participates in affiliate programs from Amazon, Booking.com, GetYourGuide and Civitatis. When you click on an affiliate link, these third parties may set their own cookies and collect data according to their privacy policies. We recommend consulting each service's privacy policy.
privacy.rightsText: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
privacy.rightAccess: Access: know what personal data we process about you.
privacy.rightRectification: Rectification: request the correction of inaccurate data.
privacy.rightErasure: Erasure: request the deletion of your data.
privacy.rightPortability: Portability: receive your data in a structured format.
privacy.rightObjection: Objection: object to the processing of your data.
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, you can write to us at hola@tengounviaje.com. We will respond within a maximum period of 30 days.
privacy.rightsAuthority: If you believe your rights have not been properly addressed, you can file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.
privacy.retentionText: Anonymous analytics data is retained for a maximum period of 26 months, according to the default Google Analytics configuration. We do not retain identifiable personal data.
privacy.changesText: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy. Any changes will be published on this same page with the last updated date.

terms.metaTitle: Terms of Use | Tengo Un Viaje
terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use for Tengo Un Viaje. Learn about the rules for using our travel platform, affiliate links and liability limitations.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.introText: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the Tengo Un Viaje website (tengounviaje.com). By accessing and browsing this website, you agree to these terms in full. If you disagree with any of them, please do not use this site.
terms.acceptanceText: Continued use of this website implies full and unconditional acceptance of all terms and conditions set out herein, as well as any future modifications published on this page.
terms.serviceText: Tengo Un Viaje is an informational travel platform that offers:
terms.service1: Travel packs with routes, accommodations and experiences curated by our team.
terms.service2: A flight search engine that redirects to external providers for booking.
terms.service3: A shop with recommended travel products linked to Amazon.
terms.service4: Editorial content about destinations, tips and travel budgets.
terms.intellectualPropertyText: All content on this website, including text, images, graphic design, logos, icons and software, is the property of Tengo Un Viaje or its respective authors and is protected by intellectual property laws. Reproduction, distribution or modification without express written authorization is prohibited.
terms.affiliateText: This website contains affiliate links to third-party services. It is important that you understand the following:
terms.affiliate1: We participate in affiliate programs from Amazon, Booking.com, GetYourGuide, Civitatis and other services. If you make a purchase or booking through our links, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you.
terms.affiliate2: Prices shown are indicative and may vary. The final price is always displayed on the provider's platform before confirming the purchase or booking.
terms.affiliate3: Purchase, shipping, return and warranty conditions are those of the corresponding provider. Tengo Un Viaje is not a party to those transactions.
terms.userText: By using this website, you agree to:
terms.user1: Use the site lawfully and in accordance with these terms, without harming the rights of third parties or the functioning of the site.
terms.user2: Not reproduce, copy or distribute the content of the site without prior authorization.
terms.user3: Not attempt unauthorized access to the site's systems or servers.
terms.liabilityText: Tengo Un Viaje acts as an informational and recommendation platform. Accordingly:
terms.liability1: We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or permanent currency of prices, availability or schedules shown, as these depend on external providers.
terms.liability2: We are not responsible for transactions made with third parties (Amazon, Booking, airlines, etc.), including purchases, bookings, cancellations or claims.
terms.liability3: We are not liable for possible interruptions, technical errors or temporary unavailability of the website.
terms.linksText: This site contains links to third-party websites over which we have no control. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies or practices of such sites. We recommend reviewing the terms and privacy policy of any external site you access from our website.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute arising from the use of this website, both parties submit to the jurisdiction of the courts of Spain.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be published on this page with the last updated date. Continued use of the site after changes are published implies acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, you can contact us at hola@tengounviaje.com.
terms.relatedText: Please also review our privacy policy to learn how we handle your data.

cookiesPage.metaDescription: Cookie policy of Tengo Un Viaje. Learn what cookies we use, their purpose and how you can manage your preferences.
cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.introText: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device (computer, tablet or phone) when you visit them. They are used to remember your preferences, analyze how you use the site and improve your browsing experience.
cookiesPage.typesText: At Tengo Un Viaje we use the following types of cookies:
cookiesPage.essentialText: These are necessary for the basic functioning of the website. They do not require your consent as the site could not function properly without them.
cookiesPage.essentialCookie1: Language preference: remembers the selected language (Spanish or English) to show you content in your preferred language.
cookiesPage.essentialCookie2: Cookie consent: stores your cookie decision so you don't see the banner on every visit.
cookiesPage.analyticsText: They allow us to anonymously analyze how users browse the website. They are only activated if you accept optional cookies through the cookie banner.
cookiesPage.analyticsCookie1: Google Analytics (_ga, _ga_*): collect anonymous information about pages visited, time spent, device type and traffic source. The IP address is anonymized.
cookiesPage.analyticsPurpose: This data helps us understand what content interests our users most and improve the site's structure and content.
cookiesPage.marketingText: We do not currently use our own marketing cookies. However, when you click on affiliate links to third-party services (Amazon, Booking, GetYourGuide, Civitatis), these providers may set their own tracking cookies according to their respective cookie policies.
cookiesPage.thirdPartyText: When you interact with affiliate links on our site, the following third parties may set cookies on your device:
cookiesPage.thirdParty1: Amazon: tracking cookies from the Amazon Associates affiliate program.
cookiesPage.thirdParty3: GetYourGuide: tracking cookies for experience bookings.
cookiesPage.thirdParty4: Civitatis: tracking cookies for activity bookings.
cookiesPage.thirdParty5: Google Analytics: web traffic analytics cookies.
cookiesPage.thirdPartyNote: We recommend consulting each of these services' cookie policies for more information.
cookiesPage.managementText: You can manage your cookie preferences in the following ways:
cookiesPage.management1: Cookie banner: when you first visit the site, you can accept all cookies or accept only essential ones.
cookiesPage.management2: Browser settings: you can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Please note that blocking all cookies may affect the site's functionality.
cookiesPage.browserTitle: How to manage cookies in common browsers
cookiesPage.browserChrome: Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies and other site data
cookiesPage.browserFirefox: Firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security > Cookies and Site Data
cookiesPage.browserSafari: Safari: Preferences > Privacy > Manage Website Data
cookiesPage.browserEdge: Edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions > Cookies and site data
cookiesPage.retentionText: The cookies we use have the following durations:
cookiesPage.retention1: Language preference: permanent (until you manually delete it).
cookiesPage.retention2: Cookie consent: permanent (until you manually delete it).
cookiesPage.retention3: Google Analytics: maximum 26 months from your last visit.
cookiesPage.legalText: In accordance with European regulations (ePrivacy Directive and GDPR) and Spanish legislation (LSSI-CE), essential cookies are installed without prior consent as they are necessary for the site's operation. Analytics and third-party cookies are only activated after your explicit consent through the cookie banner.
cookiesPage.changesText: We reserve the right to update this cookie policy. Any changes will be published on this same page with the last updated date.
cookiesPage.contactText: If you have any questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at hola@tengounviaje.com.
cookiesPage.relatedText: Please also review our privacy policy to learn how we handle your data.

blog.title: Travel Blog
blog.metaDescription: Guides, tips and budgets for your travels. Practical articles to plan your next adventure.
blog.description: Practical guides, tips and real budgets to make planning your trip as easy as enjoying it.
